lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Do you need any help? I'm looking for a quest.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I'm looking for an experienced adventurer and you're not it. Come back when you are more capable.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Are you working for them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I'm not sure. Who are they?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: EXACTLY!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seriously, what are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I think you can be trusted. What do you know about...

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: penguins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh...they live in the cold? That's about all.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Would you like to learn more about them? I'm conducting a, uh, research project, to, uh, learn about their social habits in their natural environment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need my help for?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Well, I need to build a shelter to hide from view, and it's always useful to have an extra pair of eyes, you know, for, uh, observing...Penguins.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: So, are you up for it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, why not! But first, who are you and why are you researching penguins?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I, uh, was a zoo keeper here. But, I, uh, am on leave to go research penguins in their native habitat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok! Okay then. So, what did you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Right. I need you to gather materials for the bird hide, while I arrange for our transport.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: You need to get 10 oak planks, 10 steel nails, a hammer, and a spade so that we can build a bird hide.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Once you have those, meet me up by the entrance to Keldagrim, east of Rellekka. I'll be there with a boat to take us to our destination.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, oak planks, steel nails, hammer, spade, east of Rellekka. Got it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think so.

sections.title: Right-click Travel option or interacting with the boat

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Sorry, you can't use this boat.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: What? Did you come to tell me I'm crazy too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I...

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Oh, I don't have time for your lies. Go away

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I can't speak right now. I have too much to do. I will contact you when the time is right.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: On the way I'll tell you the 42 ways penguins can torture you using a feather...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the clockwork book, could I have another?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Well, lucky for you I did make another copy. But be more careful!

sections.title: Standard dialogue at the Iceberg after Cold War

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are we going to do about the penguins?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I can't speak right now. I have too much to do. I will contact you when the time is right.

sections.title: Standard dialogue at the Ardougne Zoo after Cold War

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are we going to do about the penguins?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: I can't speak right now. I have too much to do. I will contact you when the time is right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the clockwork book, could I have another?

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Well, lucky for you I did make another copy. But be more careful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for helping My Arm earlier.

lines.speaker: Larry
lines.text: Never speak to me about that again.
